name: ViniPlay
longDescription:
ViniPlay is a self-hosted, multi-user IPTV player with a modern web interface. It proxies and transcodes M3U and EPG streams via FFmpeg (with GPU support), providing a high-performance EPG TV guide, multi-view, Chromecast, push notifications, DVR recording, and VOD support.

Supports Xtream Codes and M3U playlist sources, multiple transcoding profiles, and multi-user accounts. Users add their own playlist sources through the web UI Settings tab.
description: A self-hosted multi-user IPTV player with EPG guide, transcoding, DVR, and VOD.
